property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.9.10-hotspot in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.9.10-hotspot in;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\AutoFirmaJA\AutoFirmaJA;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;Z:\Program Files\Calibre\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\150\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;Z:\Usuarios\Usuario\.dotnet	ools;Z:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;z:\Usuarios\Usuario\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: fetchWithRetries_interruptedMidRetry
testcase.system-out: 23:37:12.666 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando en Open Library: https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=query&limit=5&offset=0&fields=key,title,author_name,first_publish_year,cover_i,edition_count,ia,has_fulltext,description,ratings_average,subject,series 23:37:12.671 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Búsqueda general en OpenLibrary sin resultados, intentando fallback por título y autor para: query 23:37:12.671 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por título en Open Library: query 23:37:12.672 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por autor en Open Library: query 23:37:12.673 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Fallback encontró 0 libros para query=query

testcase.name: searchBooks_unexpectedException_returnsEmpty
testcase.system-out: 23:37:12.678 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando en Open Library: https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=q&limit=5&offset=0&fields=key,title,author_name,first_publish_year,cover_i,edition_count,ia,has_fulltext,description,ratings_average,subject,series 23:37:12.681 testcase.name: searchBooks_limitOver1000_clamped
testcase.system-out: 23:37:12.695 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando en Open Library: https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=q&limit=1000&offset=0&fields=key,title,author_name,first_publish_year,cover_i,edition_count,ia,has_fulltext,description,ratings_average,subject,series RestTemplate call failed on attempt 3: fail 23:37:15.708 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Búsqueda general en OpenLibrary sin resultados, intentando fallback por título y autor para: q 23:37:15.708 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por título en Open Library: q 23:37:15.709 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 1: fail 23:37:16.711 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 2: fail 23:37:18.725 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 3: fail 23:37:18.726 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por autor en Open Library: q 23:37:18.727 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 1: fail 23:37:19.730 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 2: fail 23:37:21.736 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 3: fail 23:37:21.736 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Fallback encontró 0 libros para query=q

testcase.name: searchBooks_nullOffsetDefaulted
testcase.system-out: 23:37:21.739 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando en Open Library: testcase.name: searchBooks_validationAndRestFailure
testcase.system-out: 23:37:30.793 [main] ERROR com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Error de validación: El término de búsqueda no puede estar vacío 23:37:30.794 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando en Open Library: https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=query&limit=5&offset=0&fields=key,title,author_name,first_publish_year,cover_i,edition_count,ia,has_fulltext,description,ratings_average,subject,series 23:37:30.795 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 1: fail 23:37:31.798 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 2: fail 23:37:33.802 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 3: fail 23:37:33.803 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Búsqueda general en OpenLibrary sin resultados, intentando fallback por título y autor para: query 23:37:33.803 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por título en Open Library: query 23:37:33.803 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 1: fail 23:37:34.811 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por autor en Open Library: query 23:37:36.814 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 1: fail 23:37:37.827 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 2: fail 23:37:39.835 [main] WARN com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- RestTemplate call failed on attempt 3: fail 23:37:39.835 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Fallback encontró 0 libros para query=query

testcase.name: searchByTitle_andByAuthor_limitClamp
testcase.system-out: 23:37:39.838 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por título en Open Library: T 23:37:39.839 [main] INFO com.tfg.lunaris_backend.domain.service.OpenLibraryService -- Buscando por autor en Open Library: A
